subject: [PATCH 10/11] mm/zsmalloc: Handle single object charge migration in migrate_zspage

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the patch's handling of node migrations, suggesting a simpler approach to uncharge-charging operations.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series addresses zsmalloc's handling of single object charge migration in migrate_zspage, ensuring that lruvec and node statistics are correctly transferred across affected nodes.
